privileged_info_summary: The task requires adding a meal named 'Pre-Workout Meal' to a synthetically generated nutrition plan called 'Muscle Building' in the wger fitness manager. The setup script dynamically creates the plan via API and launches the browser directly to the plan's view page (http://localhost/en/nutrition/<PLAN_ID>/view/). The verifier is a stub, so evaluation relies entirely on an external VLM analyzing the final trajectory or screenshot.
